headline: PGIM Launches Its First Private Credit CIT for DC Plans
summary: The trust will kick off a broader lineup of private-market products for retirement plans.

raw.headline: PGIM Launches Its First Private Credit CIT for DC Plans

headline: Does Prudential (PRU) Balancing Dividends, Buybacks, and New Debt Reveal Its True Capital Priorities?
summary: Prudential Financial, Inc. recently declared a quarterly dividend of US$1.40 per share of common stock, payable on June 11, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 26, 2026, while also reporting first-quarter 2026 net income of US$597 million and diluted EPS from continuing operations of US$1.68. The combination of a steady dividend payout, ongoing share repurchases totaling about 0.7% of shares for US$248.51 million, and a new 5.000% senior unsecured InterNotes offering highlights how...

headline: PGIM launches first private credit CIT to broaden defined contribution market access
summary: NEWARK, N.J., May 14, 2026--The CIT provides exposure to a broad range of investment-grade private placement and investment-grade asset-based finance securities.

raw.headline: PGIM launches first private credit CIT to broaden defined contribution market access

headline: Employers say they’re doing enough to help with medical costs, but workers disagree
summary: Companies could see lower productivity, increased absenteeism and higher turnover as employees face financial stress, Prudential Financial said.

raw.headline: Employers say they’re doing enough to help with medical costs, but workers disagree
